productDisplayName: Timberland Women Femmes Blue Casual Shoes
description: Your search for that absolutely comfortable floater comes to an end with the timberland Pinkham Mary Jane sandal. With a suede and mesh upper, this sandal offers comfort at its best.UpperSuede and mesh upper for absolute breathable comfortSuede midfoot strap with a button and elastic loop closureZig-zag elastic bands on the forefoot for snug comfortFabric inner lining for all-day sweat-free comfortAnti-fatigue foam footbed with a fabric lining for all-day comfortMidsoleEVA midsole for durability and all-day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with leaf-shaped lugs throughout the footbed, concentric triangular lugs on the big toe mound and semi-circular lugs on the heel for absolute grip and tractionCurved midfoot for inner arch supportFloater careWipe dust with a clean and dry clothUse a suede brush to maintain the upperDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
